title: pyrethrum × sinense
intro: Pyrethrum × sinense, also known as Chinese pyrethrum, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Pyrethrum cinerariaefolium and Tanacetum coccineum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Pyrethrum × sinense include relief from headaches, fever, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
